system.description:
A round shield up to 2' across. Only characters with Fighting Style Specialization (Weapon & Shield) gain its +1 AC; others gain no benefit. Does not protect a vulnerable character. Encumbrance 1 item.

Judges Journal optional shield rules (pp. 407–408). Enable the shield-variant overlay to apply the type-specific rules; otherwise it behaves as a standard +1 AC shield.
